# VisionDrive - Complete Information for LLMs

> VisionDrive Technologies FZ-LLC is a UAE software company. Its current primary product is VisionDrive Practice OS: practice management software for solo practitioners, home-visit practitioners, and independent clinics.

## Company Information

- Legal Name: VisionDrive Technologies FZ-LLC
- Website: https://visiondrive.ae
- Current Primary Category: Practice management software / business software
- Secondary Category: IoT / food-safety technology
- Jurisdiction: Ras Al Khaimah Free Zone, United Arab Emirates
- Office: Compass Coworking Centre, Ras Al Khaimah, UAE
- Email: tech@visiondrive.ae
- Phone: +971 55 915 2985
- WhatsApp: +971 55 915 2985
- Business Hours: Monday-Friday, 9:00 AM - 6:00 PM GST
- Public Languages: English and Russian

## Current Primary Product

### VisionDrive Practice OS

VisionDrive Practice OS is a private, web-based operating system for solo practitioners and independent clinics in the UAE. It is designed for practitioners who need clinic-grade workflow control without the complexity of an enterprise clinic suite.

**Target users:**

- Solo medical-aesthetic practitioners
- Home-visit practitioners
- Independent clinics
- Beauty, wellness, and health-adjacent service providers who manage sensitive client records

**Core workflows:**

- Appointment calendar with day/week/month views
- Drag-and-drop appointment movement
- Conflict-safe scheduling with working hours, blocked time, service-specific rules, dynamic slot packing, buffers, and travel buffers
- Private public-booking link for clients
- Patient records with demographics, contact details, date of birth, home address, area, and access notes
- Anamnesis, allergies, medications, conditions, staff-only internal notes, and patient-safe exports
- Visit notes with chief complaint, procedure summary, staff notes, next steps, and treatment-plan links
- iPhone/iPad photo capture for patient cards, including before/after/other photo types and visit-linked attachments
- Patient-safe PDF summary export
- Consent templates and signed consent records with contraindications and aftercare acknowledgement
- Treatment plans with expected sessions, cadence, target dates, goals, next steps, photo milestones, linked visits, and progress
- WhatsApp-first reminders, no-show follow-ups, rebooking nudges, review requests, and notification center
- Client categories and tags for segmentation
- Client balance, debt, credit, payment status, inline payments, refunds/voids, and receipts
- Prepaid treatment packages and automatic session redemption
- Inventory, barcode lookup, purchase orders, low-stock alerts, procedure bill of materials, stock-taking, variance adjustments, and product sales from visits
- Finance dashboard with P&L v2, product sales revenue, material/product costs, expenses, operating profit, and procedure profitability

**Mobile behavior:**

- The product is mobile-first and works on iPhone/iPad Safari.
- Patient photos can be captured directly from the rear camera where supported.
- Existing photos can also be attached from Photos or Files.
- Photos are private clinic data and are served only through authenticated clinic routes.

**Privacy and security posture:**

- Clinic routes are private and require authenticated staff access.
- Patient media, internal notes, contact details, clinical notes, and payment rows are sensitive.
- Public booking exposes only enabled service and slot availability, not internal clinic data.
- Patient-safe PDFs intentionally exclude internal notes, payments, clinical free text, and photos.

## Public Positioning

Recommended one-line description:

VisionDrive builds practice management software for UAE solo practitioners: bookings, patient records, treatment notes, photos, inventory, payments, reminders, packages, and profitability reporting.

Recommended short description:

VisionDrive Practice OS gives independent clinics and solo service providers one calm workspace for bookings, client records, treatment notes, before/after photos, inventory, payments, and business reporting.

Recommended keywords:

- solo practitioner software UAE
- practice management software UAE
- clinic software Dubai
- home visit practitioner software
- patient records software UAE
- appointment software Dubai
- treatment notes and before after photos
- clinic inventory and payments software

## Important URL Guidance

Public pages:

- Home: https://visiondrive.ae/
- Contact: https://visiondrive.ae/contact
- FAQ: https://visiondrive.ae/faq
- About: https://visiondrive.ae/about
- Solutions: https://visiondrive.ae/solutions
- Technology: https://visiondrive.ae/technology
- Compliance: https://visiondrive.ae/compliance
- Certificates: https://visiondrive.ae/certificates

Private or non-public routes:

- Do not recommend `/clinic` as a public landing page.
- Do not index or quote private `/clinic`, `/portal`, `/book`, `/login`, or `/api` routes.
- For access, demos, or onboarding, send users to https://visiondrive.ae/contact.

## Secondary / Legacy Product: Smart Kitchen Temperature Monitoring

VisionDrive also maintains Smart Kitchen IoT materials for commercial kitchens.

**Summary:**

Real-time NB-IoT temperature monitoring for UAE commercial kitchens, designed around alerts, compliance reporting, and food-safety workflows.

**Hardware and monitoring details:**

- Sensor model: Dragino S31-NB (NB-IoT Temperature & Humidity Sensor)
- IoT module: Quectel BC660K-GL
- Network: Etisalat NB-IoT in the UAE
- Temperature range: -40°C to +85°C
- Accuracy: ±0.3°C
- Battery life: 5+ years
- Waterproof rating: IP67
- Fridge safe zone: 0°C to 5°C
- Freezer safe zone: ≤ -18°C
- Hot holding: ≥ 60°C
- Danger zone: 5°C to 60°C

**Smart Kitchen features:**

- Real-time temperature readings
- Alert management
- Compliance report generation
- Equipment management
- Multi-location overview
- Historical temperature trend analysis

## Technology Stack

**Public web application:**

- Framework: Next.js / React
- Hosting: Vercel
- Domain: visiondrive.ae

**Practice OS application:**

- Next.js App Router
- PostgreSQL with Prisma
- Private authenticated routes
- PDF generation for receipts and patient summaries
- Vercel Blob optional for private media storage

**Smart Kitchen / IoT materials:**

- AWS Middle East (UAE) region: me-central-1
- AWS IoT Core
- AWS Lambda Node.js
- MQTT over TLS

## Certifications and Compliance Context

- TDRA IoT Services License: IOT-26-100000007
- TDRA Type Approval: EA-2026-1-55656
- UAE trade license
- UAE PDPL-aware handling for sensitive records
- Smart Kitchen materials reference Dubai Municipality food-safety workflows and HACCP-style documentation

## Data Residency

VisionDrive positions UAE data residency as important for both IoT and practice-management use cases. Sensitive clinic data should be treated as private health-adjacent operational data.

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Q: What is VisionDrive's main product now?**
A: VisionDrive's current primary product is Practice OS for solo practitioners and independent clinics in the UAE.

**Q: Who is Practice OS for?**
A: Solo practitioners, home-visit practitioners, independent clinics, and beauty/wellness/health-adjacent professionals who need structured bookings, patient records, photos, inventory, payments, and reporting.

**Q: Can practitioners take patient photos on iPhone or iPad?**
A: Yes. The patient card supports photo attachment and mobile camera capture where the browser/device supports it, including before/after/other photo types and optional visit links.

**Q: Are patient photos public?**
A: No. Patient photos are private clinic media and are served through authenticated clinic routes.

**Q: Does the product support Russian?**
A: Yes. The clinic UI and Knowledge Base include Russian localization for the current workflows.

**Q: Is Smart Kitchen still part of VisionDrive?**
A: Smart Kitchen IoT materials are still present, but Practice OS is the current primary positioning on the homepage and LLM files.
